message:
fix: faster daemon cold start via memimg reuse

- Reuse existing memimg files on daemon restart (2.5s -> 67ms cold start)
- Reduce retry sleep from 100ms to 10ms (faster daemon connection)

Before: Cold start took 2.5s to create 576MB CoW snapshot
After: Cold start reuses existing memimg if available (67ms)

This fixes the 1+ second startup variance in CI benchmarks.
